facilities.title: My Aged Care Sdn. Bhd
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care Sdn Bhd is a licensed elder care operator running a network of compact nursing homes concentrated in Petaling Jaya, Selangor. The group was established in 2008 by medical professionals, and branches include My Manor (PJS 7), PJ Old Town (Jalan Othman and Jalan Terus), and Jalan Assunta (immediately adjacent to Assunta Hospital). Each site is a small household-scale setting — typically around 20 beds — rather than a large institutional facility. The group also operates MAC Physio Corner, an in-house physiotherapy service, and dispatches home nursing teams from the same operational base.

The operator's stated care model runs consistently across its network: 24-hour nursing with hourly monitoring rounds, an on-call doctor available at all times, and six dietitian-approved meals served daily. Laundry is included in the base service. Published care capabilities span general assisted living, bedridden nursing, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, dementia care, palliative support, wound management, and respite admissions. The group positions itself as a medically led rather than hospitality-led operator — the founding team's clinical background is cited on the operator website, and the care protocols reflect this orientation.

Because each branch is small, availability at any given site varies and can fill up during busy periods. Families should visit the specific branch they are considering, as staffing levels, room configurations, and amenities differ between locations. Pricing is not published on the operator website; contact the group to discuss fees for the specific branch in question. When calling, ask which branch has current availability, what is included in the base monthly fee, and whether physiotherapy and specialist consultations are bundled or separately charged.

facilities.title: My Aged Care Nursing Home in PJ @ My Manor
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care's My Manor branch is the flagship property of My Aged Care Sdn Bhd, occupying roughly 10,000 square feet behind the MBPJ City Council building in PJS 7, Petaling Jaya. The operator, established in 2008 by medical professionals, describes this as a low-density site — fewer residents per floor than typical multi-storey nursing homes — giving it a more residential character than a ward-style institution. It is the original and largest of the group's Petaling Jaya network, which also spans PJ Old Town and Jalan Assunta.

The operator's website describes 24-hour nursing care with hourly monitoring rounds backed by an on-call doctor, and six dietitian-approved meals per day. Care capabilities stated across the My Aged Care network include bedridden nursing, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, dementia care, palliative support, wound management, and respite admissions. In-house physiotherapy is available through the MAC Physio Corner service shared across the group's branches. Day care and home nursing dispatched from the same team are listed as additional options beyond full-time residential placement.

This branch holds a 4.5-star Google rating across 142 reviews — the highest review volume in the My Aged Care network. The low-density model means total bed capacity is limited, so confirm current availability before planning an admission. Pricing is not published on the website; request a full written breakdown during your visit. Questions to bring: the doctor on-call arrangement and response protocol, nurse-to-resident ratio overnight, how the team manages dementia behaviour, what palliative care support looks like, and which services are included versus billed as extras.

facilities.title: My Aged Care Nursing Home in PJ Old Town
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care PJ Old Town operates from premises along Jalan Othman and Jalan Terus in PJ Old Town, a well-connected part of Petaling Jaya within easy reach of Assunta Hospital and the broader PJ healthcare corridor. It is one of several branches run by My Aged Care Sdn Bhd, established in 2008 by a team of medical professionals. This site is classified as a nursing home — the care ceiling is higher here than at the group's retirement-home-classified locations — and it holds a 4.8-star Google rating across 92 reviews.

The operator's stated care model runs consistently across the network: 24-hour nursing with hourly monitoring rounds, an on-call doctor, six dietitian-approved meals daily, laundry, and structured daily activities. Documented care capabilities include residential nursing, dementia care, bedridden nursing, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, respite care, and palliative support. Physiotherapy is available through the group's MAC Physio Corner service. Room configurations across the network run from dormitory to single occupancy; confirm which types are currently available at PJ Old Town specifically.

All My Aged Care branches share the same enquiry line, so when calling, ask specifically about the PJ Old Town site — staffing levels, bed count, and room availability differ between branches. Pricing is not published online; request a full written breakdown covering what is included in the base monthly rate versus billed separately. Before committing, verify nurse-to-resident ratios overnight, how dementia behaviour is managed, the palliative care escalation protocol, and the JKM registration status for this specific Jalan Othman premises.

facilities.title: My Aged Care Nursing Home in Petaling Jaya @ Jalan Assunta
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care @ Jalan Assunta sits at 9 Jalan Assunta 4/52, Petaling Jaya, directly adjacent to Assunta Hospital — one of the clinically most advantageous locations a nursing home can occupy in the PJ area. The proximity makes emergency transfers and outpatient specialist follow-ups significantly more manageable compared with sites further from a major hospital. The facility is operated by My Aged Care Sdn Bhd (established 2008) as part of its network of small nursing homes across Petaling Jaya. Google Maps lists this site as a retirement home, though the broader My Aged Care service range encompasses skilled nursing and medical care.

The operator's documented care model applies across all branches: 24-hour nursing with hourly monitoring, an on-call doctor, six dietitian-approved meals daily, laundry, and structured daily activities. Published care capabilities include post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, dementia care, bedridden nursing, respite, and palliative support. In-house physiotherapy through the MAC Physio Corner service is available across the network. Room configurations range from dormitory to single occupancy, with the exact options at Jalan Assunta confirmed on a viewing.

This branch holds a 4.4-star rating across 85 reviews. As with all My Aged Care sites, bed capacity is limited by the household-scale format — confirm availability before planning an admission. Pricing is not published; request a written breakdown covering what is included versus billed separately. At your viewing, ask: which doctor covers the on-call arrangement and what the response protocol looks like, the current overnight nurse-to-resident ratio, dementia management approach, and palliative care support at this specific branch.

facilities.title: AMAZING GRACE SENIOR HOME
facilities.editorial_summary:
Amazing Grace Senior Home is a residential elder care facility at Jalan SS19/4, SS19, Subang Jaya, operated under the Amazing Grace Care Centre brand. The brand also runs a sister property in Section 14, Petaling Jaya, placing both facilities within the Subang-PJ corridor within reach of Subang Jaya Medical Centre and other private hospitals in the area. The SS19 home is listed on Google Maps as a retirement home. It holds a 5.0-star rating across 156 reviews — one of the highest-reviewed and most consistently rated nursing and care facilities in the entire Klang Valley.

The facility's care profile is oriented toward assisted living and supervised residential support: regular meals, personal care, daily monitoring of vital signs, and structured activities including exercise for residents with limited mobility. The retirement home classification on Google Maps suggests the resident profile leans toward seniors needing day-to-day support and supervision rather than complex clinical intervention. Reviewer accounts consistently highlight responsive staff, clean surroundings, and regular welfare monitoring. Short-term respite and day care options may be available alongside long-term residential placement — confirm the full range of admissions on a visit.

Amazing Grace does not publish pricing or room configurations on an operator website. Monthly fees and room types must be discussed directly with the home. Families should confirm: whether registered nursing staff are on-site overnight, what the escalation protocol is when a resident's health deteriorates, whether the facility holds a current JKM registration, and which care levels and dependency levels are accepted. The 5.0-star rating across 156 reviews reflects genuine, sustained family engagement — this home is worth including early in your shortlist.

facilities.title: AMAZING GRACE RETIREMENT HOME
facilities.editorial_summary:
Amazing Grace Retirement Home is at 11, Jalan 14/55, Section 14, Petaling Jaya — a residential neighbourhood with solid transport links and proximity to hospitals in the PJ corridor. It is operated under the Amazing Grace Care Centre brand alongside the sister home in SS19, Subang Jaya. The Section 14 site carries a broader listing on Google Maps — nursing home, assisted living facility, and physiotherapy provider — which points to a higher clinical ceiling than the SS19 counterpart. The facility holds a 4.9-star rating across 140 reviews, making it one of the most consistently well-reviewed care homes in Petaling Jaya.

Documented care capabilities at this branch include wound care, bedsore management, pain management, physiotherapy, and 24-hour observation. Long-term residential and day care options appear to be available, with short-term respite placements worth confirming directly. The nursing home and physiotherapy listing combination suggests capacity for post-hospitalisation rehabilitation alongside longer-term residential nursing. Reviewer accounts note regular vital sign monitoring, daily exercise support for residents with limited mobility, and attentive staff. The facility is described as including garden space, which is not universally available at care facilities in the area.

Amazing Grace does not publish pricing or room configurations online. Monthly fees and room types must be discussed directly with the home. Before committing, confirm: whether physiotherapy is delivered by an in-house registered physiotherapist or an external visiting contractor, what overnight nursing staffing looks like, whether a doctor attends on a scheduled basis, the JKM registration status of the facility, and what is included in the base monthly fee versus billed separately. The strong rating across 140 reviews makes this a high-priority home to view for families in the PJ area.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing Home(Sungai Long & Kajang ElderCare Center) 加影碧绿疗养院
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen's Sungai Long site, listed as the Kajang ElderCare Center, is at Landmark Residences 2, Bandar Sungai Long — in the southern Klang Valley, serving families from Balakong, Seri Kembangan, Cheras, and Kajang. The branch is part of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group, founded in 2017, which has expanded to multiple locations across the Klang Valley. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to formally integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine into residential nursing care as a standard, structured offering rather than an occasional add-on.

Clinical capabilities documented for the Mintygreen network include 24-hour nursing, bi-weekly GP consultations, NG tube feeding and changes, stoma and urinary catheter care, insulin administration, wound and pressure ulcer management, and oxygen therapy. TCM services — acupuncture and Tui Na — are offered alongside conventional physiotherapy and medication management. Day care and short-term respite placements are available in addition to long-term residential stays. The site is within 10–15 minutes of Columbia Asia Cheras, UKM Medical Centre, KPJ Kajang Hospital, and Kajang Hospital, making specialist follow-ups more practical than at more remote care locations.

This branch holds a 4.6-star Google rating across 108 reviews. Pricing is not posted on the operator website — request a written quotation specifying what is included in the base fee versus charged separately. When visiting, ask about current bed availability at this branch, overnight nurse-to-resident ratio, which specific TCM services are on offer at this site and how they are priced relative to the base monthly fee, and the JKM licence number for the Sungai Long premises. The review volume reflects genuine and sustained long-term family engagement with the facility.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Senior Care Center Cheras(Sungai Long) 蕉赖碧绿疗养院
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Senior Care Center uses a Cheras-Sungai Long branding but is located in Bandar Sungai Long, Kajang — accessible from Cheras via the Cheras-Kajang Expressway but geographically within the southern Klang Valley. The facility is part of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group (founded 2017), which operates multiple branches across the Klang Valley and describes itself as Malaysia's first nursing home chain to formally integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine into its standard care programme. The site's Google Maps listing spans retirement home, medical centre, and nursing home, reflecting a broader dependency range than basic assisted living.

Across the Mintygreen network, documented clinical capabilities include 24-hour nursing care, bi-weekly GP consultations, NG tube management, stoma and catheter care, insulin administration, wound and pressure ulcer treatment, and oxygen therapy. Traditional Chinese Medicine — acupuncture and Tui Na massage — is offered alongside conventional physiotherapy. The group holds an AgeCope certification. Post-stroke, post-cancer, and post-operative recovery are listed as care tracks across the network. Day care and short-term respite are available in addition to long-term residential placements.

This branch holds a 4.7-star rating across 13 reviews. Bed count and pricing are not published for this branch specifically — request a written quote during your visit. On viewing, ask: which services are available directly at this site versus requiring transfer to the larger Sungai Long campus, what overnight nurse staffing looks like, the JKM registration details for these premises, and whether TCM services are bundled into the monthly fee or charged as a separate line item. The Cheras-Kajang corridor access makes this site convenient for families spanning both catchments.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing & Retirement Home (Kepong and PJ Bandar Sri Damansara)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen's Bandar Sri Damansara branch is at Sphere Damansara, Jalan PJU 10/9, Prima Damansara — a commercial location on the KL-Selangor border that draws families from both the Kepong corridor and the northern PJ catchment. It is part of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group (founded 2017), which has built its identity around integrating Traditional Chinese Medicine alongside conventional nursing care in a way that distinguishes it from most other Malaysian operators. The branch serves residents across the dependency spectrum, from semi-ambulant seniors needing daily assistance through to fully bedridden patients requiring 24-hour nursing.

Clinical capabilities documented for the Mintygreen network include 24-hour nursing, bi-weekly GP visits, NG tube feeding, catheter care, insulin administration, and pressure ulcer prevention and treatment. Day care and short-term respite are available alongside long-term placements. Post-stroke, post-cancer, and post-operative recovery are listed care tracks. TCM physicians provide acupuncture and Tui Na on-site as a complementary therapy layer. The Mintygreen group holds an AgeCope certification. Structured daily activities and psychological support services are part of the group's broader service offering across branches.

This branch holds a 4.1-star rating across 50 reviews. Bed capacity and monthly pricing for the BSD branch are not published — request a detailed written quotation during your visit. On viewing, confirm: which clinical staff are based full-time at this branch, what the overnight registered nurse arrangement looks like, the TCM physician's visit schedule, whether complex cases are managed on-site or referred to larger Mintygreen locations, and the JKM Act 506 licence number for the Prima Damansara premises.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Care Suites - Home Care Nursing Cheras KL
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Care Suites is at 100, Jalan Cheras, Phoenix Business Park, Kuala Lumpur — a few minutes' walk from Taman Connaught MRT station and on the Cheras-Kajang Expressway corridor. The facility is operated by Mintygreen Care Suites Cheras Sdn Bhd, part of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group (founded 2017). Unlike the group's shoplot-format branches, this outlet uses converted commercial suites in a more hotel-style configuration, with individual rooms rather than open ward layouts. Nearest acute hospitals include Pantai Hospital Cheras (approximately 3 km), Sunway Velocity Medical Centre (approximately 7 km), and Hospital Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia (approximately 5 km).

Services documented across the Mintygreen network and indicated for this branch include 24-hour nursing care, day care and overnight respite, hospice and palliative care, NG tube feeding, catheter care, bedsore management, post-operative recovery, medication administration, and fortnightly GP visits. Physiotherapy and Traditional Chinese Medicine — acupuncture and Tui Na — are Mintygreen group features; confirm which of these are available directly at this Cheras branch versus at larger network sites. A home nursing dispatch service is listed as a separate arm of the broader Mintygreen operation.

This branch holds a 4.8-star rating across 21 reviews. Bed count and monthly rates are not published; request a written quote during your visit. On viewing, confirm: which services are delivered in-house versus by external contractors at this location, overnight nursing staffing levels, whether TCM services are available on-site here or only at the Sungai Long campus, and the JKM registration for the Jalan Cheras premises. The MRT proximity and suite-based room format may suit families seeking an accessible, more urban care setting within KL.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Care Centre @ USJ21, Subang Jaya
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Care Centre USJ21 operates from Jalan USJ 21/10, UEP Subang Jaya — a mature residential township with established road networks and proximity to Subang Jaya Medical Centre, one of the principal private hospitals in the Klang Valley. It is a smaller, neighbourhood-scale branch within the Mintygreen Healthcare Group (founded 2017), a chain known across its multi-location network for integrating Traditional Chinese Medicine into standard residential nursing care alongside conventional clinical services.

Across the Mintygreen network, documented services include 24-hour nursing care, post-surgical and post-stroke recovery, regular GP visits, physiotherapy, psychological counselling, TCM (acupuncture and Tui Na), dietetic services, and day care. The group also operates '24 Angels', a home care service arm. Not every service offered at the group's larger locations — particularly specialist rehabilitation and TCM physician consultations — is necessarily available at the smaller USJ21 branch. Confirm directly which services are delivered on-site before making any decision based on the network's full capability listing.

This branch holds a 5.0-star rating from a small number of reviews at time of listing; that rating carries less weight than the same score at a more heavily reviewed facility. Bed capacity and pricing are not published. For families in USJ or Subang Jaya wanting a local Mintygreen option, this is the most convenient branch, but a site visit to assess the actual space, staffing complement, and resident count is important before comparing it against the group's larger campuses at Sungai Long or Bandar Sri Damansara. Ask about overnight nurse staffing, JKM registration, and which services are genuinely available on-site versus centralised at other branches.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing Home (ElderCare Center)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Nursing Home (ElderCare Center) is at Landmark Residences 2, Bandar Sungai Long, Kajang — the headquarters branch of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group, founded in 2017 and grown from a single bungalow in Desa Permai to a multi-branch Klang Valley network. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine as a core, standard element of its nursing model. This Sungai Long site serves the southern Klang Valley catchment — Balakong, Seri Kembangan, Cheras, and Kajang — and is the group's most established branch.

Clinical capabilities documented on the Mintygreen operator website include 24-hour nursing, bi-weekly GP visits, NG tube and catheter management, stoma care, insulin administration, wound and pressure sore management, and oxygen therapy. Post-stroke, post-cancer, and post-operative recovery programmes are listed care tracks. TCM services — acupuncture and Tui Na — are provided alongside conventional physiotherapy. Day care and overnight respite are available in addition to long-term residential placement. The Sungai Long site is within 10–15 minutes of Columbia Asia Cheras, UKM Medical Centre, KPJ Kajang Hospital, and Kajang Hospital.

This branch holds a 4.6-star rating across over 100 reviews on Google Maps — a volume that reflects genuine, sustained family engagement. Pricing is not published on the operator website; request a written quotation specifying what is included in the base monthly fee versus charged separately. On a viewing, ask about current bed availability at this site, the overnight nurse-to-resident ratio at the Sungai Long location specifically, whether TCM services are bundled or separately charged, and the JKM licence number for these premises.
